title: Apply Western Colorado rustic aesthetic with earthy tones

requirements.text: Update the color palette in frontend/src/index.css to reflect a warm, rustic 'Western Colorado' aesthetic using earthy tones such as desert sand, canyon red, sage brush green, and weathered wood brown while maintaining the OKLCH color format

quotes: Design Style: Use a warm, rustic 'Western Colorado' aesthetic with earthy tones and clean typography.

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses earthy Western Colorado-inspired tones (desert sand, canyon red, sage, weathered wood)
Colors remain in OKLCH format for consistency with existing implementation
Both light and dark mode variants are provided
New colors integrate seamlessly with existing components

requirements.text: Update typography in frontend/tailwind.config.js to use clean, rustic-appropriate font selections that evoke a Western Colorado aesthetic while maintaining excellent readability

quotes: Design Style: Use a warm, rustic 'Western Colorado' aesthetic with earthy tones and clean typography.

acceptanceCriteria: Typography choices complement the rustic Western Colorado theme
Font selections maintain clean, readable presentation
Font stack includes appropriate fallbacks for web safety

requirements.text: Enhance frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx header and footer styling to reinforce the Western Colorado rustic aesthetic through subtle design touches such as border treatments or background textures

quotes: Design Style: Use a warm, rustic 'Western Colorado' aesthetic with earthy tones and clean typography.

acceptanceCriteria: Header reflects rustic Western Colorado theme through visual styling
Design enhancements are subtle and don't overwhelm content

requirements.text: Update frontend/src/pages/DirectoryPage.tsx hero section to feature Western Colorado-inspired visual elements and messaging that emphasize the local rustic character

quotes: Design Style: Use a warm, rustic 'Western Colorado' aesthetic with earthy tones and clean typography.

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section uses earthy color palette from updated theme
Visual presentation evokes Western Colorado rustic charm
Messaging emphasizes local character and discovery

requirements.text: Refine frontend/src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx styling to incorporate rustic design elements such as warm borders, earthy backgrounds, and typography that aligns with the Western Colorado aesthetic

quotes: Design Style: Use a warm, rustic 'Western Colorado' aesthetic with earthy tones and clean typography.

acceptanceCriteria: Restaurant cards feature rustic styling with warm, earthy tones
Card borders and backgrounds complement Western Colorado theme
Typography remains clean and readable while supporting rustic aesthetic

constraints: Maintain existing OKLCH color format in CSS variables
Do not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing functionality and component structure
nonGoals: Adding new restaurant features or functionality
